name: Hermes Agent VM
description: Hermes Agent is an open-source AI agent by NousResearch that runs locally on your machine. It supports multi-step task execution, tool use, and integration with messaging platforms. The installer automatically sets up Python 3.11, Node.js v22, ripgrep, ffmpeg, and uv.

notes.text: Hermes Agent is installed automatically on first boot. Monitor progress with: journalctl -u hermes-install.service -f
After installation completes, run 'hermes setup' to configure your LLM provider.
